anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1150: Luffy's Final Gear Revealed - World Government in Chaos
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest chapter of One Piece drops a bombshell as Luffy unveils a new Gear that combines all previous forms, devastating the Elders. Fans are speculating this is the final power-up before the series' end. Chapter sales are projected to break records with over 3 million copies sold in Japan alone on day one.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: New Anime Project Announced by Studio MAPPA
anime_pulse_items.summary: To celebrate the 20th anniversary of Death Note, Studio MAPPA has announced a brand-new anime adaptation of the original manga, promising a modern visual style and updated soundtrack. The project will be a faithful retelling with some new scenes. Pre-orders for limited edition Blu-rays have already hit 500,000 units.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto x Boruto: New Movie 'The Last Legacy' Teaser Trailer Breaks 10M Views in 24 Hours
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first teaser for the upcoming Naruto/Boruto crossover movie 'The Last Legacy' has dropped, showing an adult Boruto and a mysterious villain linked to Kaguya. Fans are hyped for the return of Naruto and Sasuke in action. The movie is set for a December 2026 release worldwide.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Super Chapter 100: Goku's New Form 'Ultra Instinct Perfected' Defeats Grand Priest?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball Super manga reaches its 100th chapter with a shocking twist: Goku's Ultra Instinct evolves to a level that challenges even the Grand Priest. The chapter ends on a cliffhanger with Beerus stepping in. Online discussions have exploded with theories about the future of the multiverse.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Culling Game Arc Episode 1 Leaked, Fans React to Animation Quality
anime_pulse_items.summary: A leaked screencap from the first episode of Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 shows Yuji and Megumi in a brutal fight against a new curse user. The animation is being praised as movie-level, with MAPPA reportedly using new techniques. The official premiere is next week, but the leak has already trended on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Trilogy Part 1 Gets August 2026 Release Date
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first movie of the Infinity Castle trilogy, covering the final battle against Muzan, has been confirmed for August 2026. Ufotable promises extended runtime and never-before-seen scenes. Advance ticket sales in Japan have already surpassed 2 million.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: Post-Finale Spin-Off Manga 'The Last Scouts' Launches, Focuses on Surviving Characters
anime_pulse_items.summary: A new spin-off manga set years after the finale follows the descendants of the Survey Corps as they uncover hidden truths about the Titans. The first chapter sold out within hours. Fans are divided on whether this expands the lore or dilutes the original ending.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Deku's Final Fight Against All For One - Series Ending Next Month
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia is nearing its climax with Deku facing All For One in a battle that will determine the fate of quirks. The manga is confirmed to end in May 2026. Fans are emotional as the series wraps up after 12 years. The chapter has trended worldwide on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: First Trailer Shows Denji's Return, Release Date July 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: The long-awaited trailer for Chainsaw Man Season 2 has dropped, featuring Denji and new characters from the International Assassins arc. MAPPA has promised even more chaotic animation. The trailer hit 5 million views in an hour on YouTube.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Movie 'Code: White' Sequel Announced, Teases New Mission in Africa
anime_pulse_items.summary: After the success of the first movie, a sequel titled 'Code: White - African Connection' has been announced. Loid and Anya will travel to Africa for a mission that involves a new organization. The movie is slated for March 2027. Fans are excited for more family fun.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren has taken home the top prize at the Crunchyroll Anime Awards, beating out heavy hitters like Jujutsu Kaisen and Demon Slayer. The series' emotional depth and stunning animation were praised. Season 2 is already in production with a 2027 release window.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: First Episode Preview Reveals Jeju Island Arc, A-1 Pictures Delivers
anime_pulse_items.summary: A preview for Solo Leveling Season 2 shows Sung Jin-Woo's battle against the Ant King on Jeju Island. The animation quality is top-notch, with A-1 Pictures using advanced CGI. The season premieres on Crunchyroll in May 2026. Manhwa readers are comparing the adaptation.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Simulcasts for Spring 2026 Including 'Kaiju No. 8' Season 2
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll has announced its Spring 2026 lineup, including the second season of Kaiju No. 8 and several new isekai titles. The platform now has over 100 million subscribers. Fans are debating the best new shows of the season.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's Live-Action 'One Piece' Season 2 Casts New Actors for Chopper and Robin
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix has revealed the cast for Chopper (CGI) and Robin for the second season of the live-action One Piece. Filming is underway in South Africa. The showrunner promises more faithful adaptation of the Alabasta arc. Fans are cautiously optimistic.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Explodes Over 'Oshi no Ko' Season 2 Finale - Major Plot Twist
anime_pulse_items.summary: The finale of Oshi no Ko Season 2 has left viewers in shock as a major character dies. The subreddit has over 10,000 comments within hours. The series is being hailed as one of the best dramas of the year. Season 3 has been greenlit.

anime_pulse_items.title: New 'Dandadan' Anime Adaptation Drops First Trailer, Looks Wildly Animated by Science SARU
anime_pulse_items.summary: The trailer for the Dandadan anime has arrived, showcasing the insane art style and fast-paced action. The series is set to premiere in October 2026. Fans of the manga are thrilled with the faithful adaptation. The trailer features a unique soundtrack.

anime_pulse_items.title: Worldwide Otaku Convention 'Anime Expo 2026' Announces Record-Breaking Attendance of 200,000
anime_pulse_items.summary: Anime Expo 2026 in Los Angeles has sold out with over 200,000 attendees, the largest in its history. Highlights include exclusive panels for Chainsaw Man Season 2 and a live concert by LiSA. The event is a testament to anime's global growth.
